name: zz-agent-plugins
description: A dual-platform local plugin marketplace for Codex and Claude Code, focused on reusable agent workflows and productivity tooling.

interface.shortDescription: Dual-platform marketplace for reusable Codex and Claude Code plugins.
interface.longDescription: This marketplace distributes local plugins from the zz-agent-plugins repository. Each plugin is maintained with matching Codex and Claude Code manifests so the same workflow can be installed consistently across both platforms.

plugins.name: specz
plugins.description: Document-driven spec workflow plugin with separate execution and verification agents, bounded repair loops, and versioned spec bundles.

plugins.name: media-prompt
plugins.description: Media prompt plugin for generating and handling media-related prompts and content.
